concerns.text: FR-001 contains significant unanchored text unrelated to User Story 1. The clause 'The research question remains: How does memory capacity affect model scalability? The method involves systematic benchmarking of resource usage under varying constraints. References include [DOI/Author-Year].' describes a different research goal and methodology not present in any User Story. This is silent scope creep. The FR should be restricted to the sampling logic described in US-1.

FR-003 mandates executing 'SonarQube' on each function. While US-1 mentions generating a baseline using 'standard Pylint and SonarQube rules', the Independent Test and Acceptance Scenarios for US-1 only verify Pylint output (e.g., 'C0103') and structural metrics. There is no test scenario or success criterion verifying the ingestion or processing of SonarQube results. This creates a risk of unbacked implementation effort for a tool that may not be integrated in the testable scope.
